headline: Gilead Sciences announces the acquisition of Arcellx, Inc. for $115.00 per share in cash plus a $5.00 Contingent Value Right tied to anito-cel sales milestones.
investor_impact: This acquisition significantly strengthens Gilead's cell therapy oncology pipeline by adding Arcellx's BCMA-targeting CAR-T therapy, anito-cel, which just received FDA BLA acceptance. The deal structure, featuring a $5.00 CVR contingent on $6 billion in cumulative anito-cel sales by 2029, prudently balances commercial execution risk with substantial long-term revenue upside.
key_figures: $6,000,000,000 cumulative worldwide sales milestone for anito-cel
10.3% of outstanding shares locked up in support agreements
20 business days minimum tender offer period
